taskPreset.title: Create UI Master Task
taskPreset.description: Queue a structured UI Master task preset with grouped commands, repository scope, and scene defaults.

uiMasterDefault.title: UI Master Default
uiMasterDefault.summary: Default scene registration for UI Master dispatch and captain routing.

panel.projectHint: The UI Master task will be created in the selected project.
panel.taskNameHint: Optional. Leave empty to let the title be optimized asynchronously after dispatch.
panel.repositoryAccessHint: Choose repositories from the selected project and assign read or write access per repository.
panel.repositoryAccessEmpty: No repositories are available for the selected project yet.
panel.commandHint: Keep the original English command labels and use localized tooltip copy for intent.
panel.detailHint: Describe the intended UI outcome, constraints, and tradeoffs you care about.
panel.detailPlaceholder: Tighten hierarchy, soften background noise, strengthen CTA contrast, and improve mobile spacing.
panel.referenceVaultsHint: Optionally attach vaults as read-only reference context for assets, docs, snippets, or prior explorations.
panel.projectReferencesHint: Optionally attach other projects as read-only context when this UI work depends on shared patterns or adjacent implementations.

craft.description: Create a fresh interface or component direction with strong initial structure.

impeccable.description: Run the core UI Master flow for ambitious interface polish and UX shaping.

shape.description: Shape layout and hierarchy for a new or substantially reworked UI concept.

audit.description: Evaluate the current interface for UX, accessibility, hierarchy, and friction.

critique.description: Critique the current UI and explain what is not working clearly.

animate.description: Add purposeful motion and transitions that improve clarity and delight.

bolder.description: Push the interface toward stronger contrast, emphasis, and clearer visual confidence.

colorize.description: Rework color usage, accents, and mood while keeping the UI coherent.

delight.description: Add more fun, charm, and memorable moments without hurting usability.

layout.description: Rework spacing, composition, and structural layout decisions.

overdrive.description: Explore a more ambitious, high-energy UI direction.

quieter.description: Reduce noise, calm the layout, and make the interface feel more controlled.

typeset.description: Improve typography, line length, scale, and text rhythm.

adapt.description: Adapt the UI to a different surface, context, or product goal.

clarify.description: Simplify confusing elements so the interface becomes easier to parse quickly.

distill.description: Strip the UI down to the essential signals and decisions.

harden.description: Strengthen resilience, states, and implementation-readiness for production use.

onboard.description: Improve first-run understanding, empty states, and guided setup moments.

optimize.description: Optimize performance, responsiveness, and interaction efficiency.

polish.description: Refine the UI for a sharper, more finished production feel.

document.description: Extract reusable interface guidance, tokens, or documentation-ready decisions.

extract.description: Pull design patterns or reusable components out of the current UI.

live.description: Tune the interface for live iteration in an actively running surface.

teach.description: Make the UI easier for collaborators to understand and extend.
